# configure-postgrest-new-schema
Description: Configure PostgREST to expose a new database schema in a self-hosted Supabase deployment.
Source: project
1. Identify the name of the new database schema you want PostgREST to expose.
2. Access the configuration for your self-hosted Supabase instance.
3. Locate the `PGRST_DB_SCHEMAS` environment variable.
4. Add the name of your new schema to the `PGRST_DB_SCHEMAS` variable. If multiple schemas are already listed, separate the new schema name with a comma.
5. Restart the PostgREST service or the entire Supabase stack for the configuration changes to take effect.
